name: list_instance_group_managers
description: Lists Compute Engine managed instance groups (MIGs). Details for each MIG include name, ID, instance template, base instance name, target size, target stopped size, target suspended size, status and creation timestamp. Requires project and zone as input.

parameters.description: Request message for listing instance group managers basic info.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of instance group managers to return.

pageToken.description: Optional. A page token received from a previous call to list instance group managers.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

zone.description: Required. The zone of the instance group managers.
